text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is where the strongest of each
generation make themselves known. It is the
perfect race to demonstrate my royal authority!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
An obstacle yet bars my path—Admire Vega.
She's a worthy foe, and my future fans erupt as we
lock eyes!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: At last, ladies and gentlemen, Origins of the Centurial Overlord Act I begins.
